name: wiki
description: Static Civilization Wiki renderer and visualization smoke tests.

scripts.test:js: node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcData.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationProgressEvidence.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcNav.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcLayout.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationArcDraw.js && node --check compile/assets/civilizationOntology.js
scripts.test:py: python3 compile/test_live_reader_correction.py && python3 compile/test_inflight.py && python3 compile/test_ingest_server.py && python3 compile/test_build_site_security.py && python3 compile/test_stats.py && python3 compile/test_refresh.py && python3 tests/inflight.test.py
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:js && npm run test:unit && npm run test:py && npm run test:dom && npm run test:browser
